_comment: PEEK distillation policy. Read at Cloud Function invocation time via raw.githubusercontent.com (zero-redeploy per CLAUDE.md Rule #1). ASCII-only - Swift decoder rejects non-ASCII in JSON files it reads (memory gotchas_swift_decoder_non_ascii_strings.md).

_notes.useHarnessLadder: When true, resolveDistillerBackend() tries ladderOrder providers and returns the first with a valid API key configured. When false, distillContextMap() rejects calls without an explicit distillerModel argument.
_notes.ladderOrder: Cloud Functions have no local CLI access; this is the API-only fallback chain. Mirrors the spirit of HarnessCLIBackendResolver (Claude Code -> Codex -> Gemini CLI -> Anthropic API) at the API tier.
_notes.tokenBudget: Hard cap on serialized map size. Distiller schema validator throws if exceeded. Maps to ~4096 chars at the chars/token=4 estimator used by HarnessContextAssembler.
_notes.minTrajectoriesForDistill: distillContextMap rejects if context_map_trajectories count per recipeID is below this threshold. Prevents distillation on too-small samples.
_notes.retentionCapPerRecipe: pruneContextMapTrajectories deletes anything beyond the 50 most-recent per recipeID. Per-recipe quota.
_notes.retentionDays: pruneContextMapTrajectories deletes anything older than 90 days regardless of count. Global TTL.
_notes.trajectoryUploadCapBytes: uploadContextMapTrajectory rejects payloads larger than this. 32 KB per trajectory is generous; typical session captures under 4 KB.
